author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (Intel VT-d + NVMe-PCIe):

- drivers/iommu/intel-iommu.md: covers drivers/iommu/intel/{iommu,cache}.c — Intel VT-d driver (~4200 lines): per-IOMMU-unit (struct intel_iommu) lifecycle from DMAR ACPI table parse, per-domain (dmar_domain) state with legacy mode (root-table → context-table → 2nd-level pgtable) + scalable mode (PASID-table → per-PASID 1st+2nd-level pgtables for SVA + nested), QI Queued Invalidation with batch descriptors + Wait-completion sync, PRI Page-Request Interface with PRQ MMIO drain + handle_mm_fault + PR-Response, Posted-Interrupt + IR integration via IRTE programming, per-IOMMU perfmon, RMRR (Reserved Memory Region Reporting) identity-mapping for boot devices, dirty-tracking via SLADE (Sapphire Rapids+), ATS/PRI hookup with drivers/pci/ats.c. 12 REQ / 9 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (pgd-walk-OOB + qi-queue-OOB + did-uniqueness + iommu-state-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to qi_descriptor.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus host-pte → invalidate → drain chain.
- drivers/nvme/host-pci.md: covers drivers/nvme/host/pci.c — NVMe-over-PCIe transport (~4300 lines): per-controller (struct nvme_dev) BAR0 + register access (CC/CSTS/CAP/AQA/ASQ/ACQ/etc.), per-CPU IO-queue allocation (1 SQ+CQ pair per online CPU + admin SQ/CQ pair), per-queue MSI-X vector with CPU affinity, PRP/SGL construction from blk-mq sgs (PRP1+PRP2 inline + chained PRP-list pages for >2 pages), CMB (Controller Memory Buffer) for HW-side SQ/CQ low-latency, HMB (Host Memory Buffer) admin Set-Features hand-off for DRAM-less consumer SSDs, doorbell-stride decoding from CAP, controller reset state machine with quiesce → disable → re-init → unquiesce + kick_requeue_lists, surprise-removal detection, SR-IOV VF support. 14 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (queue-UAF + cqe-phase + PRP-OOB + doorbell-OOB + q-depth-overflow) / Layer-2 ref to sq_cq.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus submit↔complete round-trip.

Total state: 256 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 22 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-intel-iommu, design-drivers-nvme-host-pci.

Next iter plan: drivers/gpu/drm/gem-core.md (GEM buffer-object framework — most-referenced DRM data structure) + drivers/usb/core-urb.md (USB Request Block submission + completion + cancellation — central USB API).
